s: In 2019, Kyle Keller suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.370, WHIP 1.220, SO 11, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> LAA).

Changed teams after the previous season (LAA -> PIT).
In 2021, Kyle Keller suited up for PIT as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.480, WHIP 1.560, SO 36, WAR -0.600. Notable context: Joined PIT.
